title: taraxacum grypolobum
intro: Taraxacum grypolobum, commonly known as the crepuscular dandelion, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Taraxacum grypolobum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed to support overall well-being and promote healthy digestion.
